items.description:
Venture into the unknown with the Geo Helmet—crafted for explorers who dare to traverse the depths of oceans and the vastness of space. Its sleek, dark design exudes mystery while offering unparalleled protection. Whether you’re an underwater adventurer or an intergalactic astronaut, the Geo Helmet is your ultimate gear for conquering new frontiers.

items.name: Eliksni Captain - Helmet And Head
items.description:
"Fallen run in packs, led by an individual Captain. There is no denying a Captain's might; they are the fiercest of the Fallen. There is this sense of tattered nobility to them. You can see it in the way they carry themselves. They think they're better than us. They believe that Earth belongs to them."
